name: Etsy, Inc.
description: Etsy, Inc. operates two-sided online marketplaces that connect buyers and sellers primarily in the United States, the United Kingdom, Germany, Canada, France, Australia, and internationally. Its primary marketplace is Etsy.com, which connects artisans and entrepreneurs with consumers looking for unique, creative, and handmade goods. The company also operates Reverb, a musical instrument marketplace; Depop, a fashion resale marketplace; and Elo7, a Brazil-based marketplace for handmade items.
